title: Isoloma sciadocalyx
taxonomy: Isoloma sciadocalyx is classified as a species of lichen in the family Graphidaceae. It belongs to the genus Isoloma, which consists of various species of lichens. The family Graphidaceae is a group of crustose lichens, characterized by their crust-like growth habit. Within the class Lecanoromycetes, Graphidaceae is part of the subclass Ostropomycetidae. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics of Isoloma sciadocalyx with other lichens in the same family and genus.
